other_observers: Gavin Bieber other WINGS leader with Melissa Blanchard, Cynthia Donald, Dianne DeLorenzo, Gerald Early, Ken & Sue Feustel, John Follett, David Johnson, Dennis Johnson, Merrill Lester, Vicki Sandage and Anne Waters.; I did not get her name.
description: Gavin Beiber and I were leading a WINGS trip on our final day scanning for waterfowl at Bonny Reservoir. A woman stopped by to say that she has seen a Yellow-throated Warbler at the end of the road. Unfortunately, she left before I was able to get her name. We went to that area, pished and in flew a Yellow-throated Warbler callling. Slightly smaller (less bulky) than Yellow-rumped Warbler with noticeably longer bill. Dark gray above. Darker wings with bold wing bars formed by white tips to greater and median coverts. Black auriculars bordered in rear by large white patch. White supercilium (including above black lores). White arc below eye. Bright yellow throat bordered on sides with black. Underparts otherwise white. Bold black streaking on sides of breast and flanks. Legs, bill and eye dark.Behaviors: n/aCall: I hear the bird give a couple call notes. Difficult to describe but sharper than Yellow Warbler with a bit of a Swamp Sparrow quality.Plumage: albilora
